faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.title: Have <gradient>questions</gradient>?
faq.description: Everything you need to know about working with Start HN accounting agency.

services.question: What services do you offer?
services.answer: We offer complete accounting and bookkeeping services, tax advisory, financial report preparation, and Virtual CFO services. We also provide support in digitizing accounting processes and consulting for newly established companies.

clients.question: Who are your services intended for?
clients.answer: Our services are tailored to micro, small and medium enterprises, sole traders, associations and startups. Regardless of the size of your business, we have a solution for you.

process.question: How does the cooperation start?
process.answer: Contact us by phone, email or contact form. We'll arrange a free initial conversation to understand your needs, after which we'll propose an appropriate service package and begin the cooperation.

pricing.question: How much do your services cost?
pricing.answer: Prices depend on the volume of work, number of documents and complexity of your business activities. We offer special benefits for newly established entities. Contact us for a free estimate.

digital.question: Do you work digitally or only with physical documentation?
digital.answer: We support both work models. We prefer digitization because it enables faster data access and more efficient work, but we work equally well with documentation delivered physically or by email.

deadlines.question: How do you track deadlines and legal obligations?
deadlines.answer: We diligently track all legal deadlines and regulatory changes. We don't catch the 'last train' — we proactively monitor all obligations and inform clients on time about everything important for their business.

virtualCfo.question: What is a Virtual CFO?
virtualCfo.answer: A Virtual CFO is a strategic financial advisory and business analysis service. It's ideal for companies that want deeper insight into their finances, budget planning, profitability analysis and support in making key business decisions — without hiring a permanent financial director.

faq.ctaDescription: Get in touch — we'll be happy to answer all your questions.
